package rulecoverage

func PositiveLargeHPayloadBuiltOnlyForJsonResponse() string {
    ruleID := "large_h_payload_built_only_for_json_response"
    family := "gin"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Large gin.H payloads built as transient dynamic maps right before JSON rendering."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
